problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: Combining Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
